title: Epic Battle Music
description: Automatically adds epic battle music when fighting bosses with 200+ HP within 80 blocks.
body:
# **Epic Battle Music**

Turn every boss fight into a cinematic moment.

Fed up with battling powerful bosses in silence? **Epic Battle Music** injects drama into your Minecraft adventures by triggering custom boss themes the moment the fight begins.

Whether you're using boss mods or sticking to vanilla, any creature with over **200 HP** will activate an intense soundtrack that sets the stage.

---

### ⚔️ Features

- Dynamic battle music that plays automatically during boss fights
- Smart detection: triggers for any entity above 200 HP (modded or vanilla)
- Seamless operation across vanilla and modded Minecraft
- Ideal for RPG, adventure, or boss-themed modpacks
- Lightweight and purely client-side, no server setup required

---

### 🔧 Compatibility

- Works with mods that add custom bosses (Alex’s Mobs, Bosses of Mass Destruction, etc.)
- Requires **Fabric Loader or Forge loader**
- Currently supports **Minecraft 1.20.x to 1.21.x** (more versions coming soon)

---

### 📦 Made for Modpacks

Built with modpacks in mind, no scripting or datapacks needed. Just drop it in, and let the music elevate the action.

---

### 💬 Feedback & Suggestions

Have a boss or soundtrack idea? Want support for a certain mod? Leave a comment, your feedback helps make this mod better.

---
